#  Add a Related Item to an RFI 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information** :
    * For a selection to appear in the 'Type' menu, the corresponding tool must be an active tool on the project. See [Add and Remove Tools from a Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/add-and-remove-project-tools).
    * For a selection to appear in the 'Description' menu, you must be granted the appropriate permission to view that item in the corresponding Procore tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.  
This reveals the RFIs page, which displays all of the **Open** and **Closed** RFIs on the project.
  2. In the **Items** view, locate the desired RFI. Click **View** to open an RFI.
  3. Click the **Related Items** tab.
  4. Click **Link Related Item**.
  5. Select the **type** of item you are linking to the RFI from the side panel.
  6. Select the specific item you are linking as a related item to the RFI.
  7. _Optional:_ Add any relevant comments about the item in the **Notes** field.
  8. Click **Link**.


## See Also
  * [What is the RFI Manager role?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-rfi-manager-role)
  * [What are "related items" in Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-related-items-in-procore)
  * [Draft an RFI with AI (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/draft-an-rfi-with-ai)
title: Add a Related Item to an RFI
description: How to add a related item to a submittal to be referenced by you and any responsible party on the submittal.
